episode.title: MTG Fast Finance 354: Phyrexia All Will Be One Previews
episode.description: James and Derek guide you through all the latest in Magic the Gathering and MTGFinance news and products including Modern & Pioneer MTGO metagame analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and a walk through of the Phyrexia All Will Be One product mix and previews.
